data.body: 814 (ed13) CI FAILED (real, not docs): 5 existing tests broke. Root causes: (1) _fold_close_class stored close_class=None on non-bug closes -> schema 'None is not string' (2 tests: export_ndjson, schema_coverage); (2) library rebar.transition() had NO close_class param, so library bug-closes impossible -> 3 tests (completion_gate, idea_close_bypass, identity_txn_signing) that closed bugs via reason= broke. FIXES on detached ed13 (9efbb65ff): fold present-only; added close_class param to _lib_writes.transition() threaded to transition_compute; updated the 3 pre-existing tests to the new --class contract (intended behavior change). PROCESS FIX: run FULL make test locally for behavior-changing tickets (not just the ticket oracle+goldens) — running now. Then amend ed13, rebase 8bc5, re-push.
